title: Customizable Player Models OSC Compat
description: A Customizable Player Models, OSC/VMC protocol compat mod.
body:
Adds OSC/VMC animation triggers to [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models).  
Allows playing animations using the [OSC Protocol](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_Sound_Control). The mod only suports receiving UDP packets!  
Supports setting value layer (slider) animations using OSC. Also works with the Virtual Motion Capture protocol over OSC.  
You can set up Eye/Face tracking animations, animations based on your heart rate, or buttons on your streamdeck, etc.  
The OSC debugger is under `Edit/Tools/OSC Settings`  
Use `Edit/Tools/OSC Animation Wizard` to create OSC triggered animations easily.  
The animations must be a `Command Activated Animation`.  

Works with Forge and Fabric.
